name: Enrich Telemetry
Prepare storage POST
Storage bridge URL
info:
DEFAULT URLs assume DOCKER DESKTOP (Node-RED in a container).

POST storage bridge → http://host.docker.internal:4050/ingest
POST downtime tick → http://host.docker.internal:4050/api/storage/downtime/tick

If Node-RED runs on the host (no Docker), change BOTH http nodes to 127.0.0.1.

Linux Docker: --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway

Enable debug “storage bridge response” + Deploy to see ingest replies.
